flags.message: Known-outcome disclosure: this is the well-known 1993 Illinois forced-cesarean case (In re Baby Boy Doe sequel), and the predictor recognized from general legal knowledge that the guardian's Supreme Court application failed. The prediction was still reasoned from the pre-decision record and era base rates, but the evaluation may wish to discount this cell for hindsight contamination.

The provisioned snapshot is a bare opinion-import docket: no docket number, no dates, no docket entries, no parties/attorneys - only the caption and a single linked opinion cluster (not opened, since it is the outcome itself). The prediction rests on the caption plus general legal context.

The predict prompt tells cert predictors to anchor on the statpack's 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' section, but the committed metrics/statpack.md has no such section (it ends at 'SCOTUS petitions by Term'). Either the statpack needs regenerating with that cut or the prompt reference is stale.
